# Radial — Digital Product Design Studio

## About
Radial is a digital product design studio based in Rotterdam, the Netherlands. We design and build digital products with a strong focus on user experience, powered by AI.

## Services
- **Research & Strategy**: User research, competitive analysis, product strategy, roadmapping, stakeholder workshops
- **UX & UI Design**: Wireframing, user flows, visual design, interaction design, responsive design
- **Design Systems**: Component libraries, design tokens, documentation, Figma libraries, developer handoff
- **Build MVPs**: MVP scoping, rapid prototyping, frontend development, user testing, iteration sprints
- **Boost Branding**: Brand strategy, visual identity, typography systems, illustration style, brand guidelines
- **AI Integration**: AI opportunity mapping, prompt engineering, AI-powered features, LLM integration, workflow automation

## AI Expertise
We use AI throughout our design process — from research synthesis and brainstorming to prototyping and content generation. We also help clients integrate AI into their products through intelligent automation and generative features.

## Pricing
- **Sprint**: 40 hours / EUR 4,800 — For smaller projects or focused design sprints
- **Growth**: 100 hours / EUR 11,000 — For ongoing projects (most popular)
- **Scale**: 200 hours / EUR 20,000 — For long-term partnerships with a dedicated designer

## Ideal Clients
- Startups building their first product (MVP)
- Scale-ups improving existing products
- Companies looking to integrate AI into their products
- Teams needing design system expertise

## Location
Voorhaven 27C, 3025 HC Rotterdam, the Netherlands

- Email: hello@studioradial.com
